positive: A whimsical, geometric pattern featuring stylized constellations and mythical beasts woven into a cosmic tapestry. The primary subject is a central, glowing nebula framing a pair of elegant, interconnected celestial bodies (planets or moons). Use a strong, contrasting color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, brilliant gold, and magenta. The style should be a seamless, Art Deco-meets-Cosmic-Whimsy aesthetic, suitable for repeating apparel print. Ensure clean, sharp silhouettes and high contrast. Composition must be symmetrical and centered. Detailed line work, gradient fill, graphic vector quality, designed for fabric printing.
negative: low detail, blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, poor composition, bad anatomy, ugly, cluttered, grayscale, solid color, muted, dirty, grainy
